run_summary.summary: Mariah's Friday status email is the MVP this week — the full deal table fills in a lot of gaps. Aleve is officially confirmed in content approval with $12k on the line 💼. Smart Solar Lights has a hard Monday/Tuesday content deadline (Apr 27-28) and Liz already uploaded her caption, but the reel itself needs to be finished ASAP 🎬. Bark was due yesterday (4/24) with no delivery confirmation in email — needs an urgent check. On the exciting side: new inbound from iGarden (Make Wonder INC) for a paid collab + free $2,000+ pool product with a May 20 window — Liz hasn't replied yet. Also, Alisa at Hawke Media confirmed the Ollie's Expert Transition ads are live and she increased spend 🤝. Two more to keep an eye on from Mariah's table: JLab March campaign had the wrong registration email and $2,000 payment is 5 days overdue; and Antique Candle Co ($1,500, June flash sale) is on Mariah's list but may not have a board card.

suggestions.message: Bark TikTok + Whitelisting ($750) was due 4/24 — that was yesterday. No delivery confirmation found anywhere in the inbox. Check if this got posted and if so, move to Delivered and send that invoice!

JLab March campaign: $2,000 Reel/Story was due 4/20 — now 5 days late. Per Mariah's status: JLab had the wrong email for Liz's registration form, so they should be resending it + payment ASAP. Check the JLab March child card and confirm the form + $2k arrived.

Hard deadline: content due Monday/Tuesday April 27-28 per the brand. Liz uploaded her caption to Drive on Apr 24 and the social media manager confirmed receipt, but the reel is still 'in progress.' It needs to be submitted before Tuesday or the deadline is blown.
JLab May campaign ($2,000, 1 Reel/Story) is flagged 'ready for content' in Mariah's Friday status. Check the JLab May child card — should be in Content stage. Drive folder: Liz-Jlab.

Antique Candle Co is on Mariah's weekly status list ($1,500 — 2 story frames for a June 18-22 clearance flash sale, started 4/1), but I don't see a board card for it. Check if it exists and create one if not.
Mariah's status notes Aquara ($1,500 for 1 Reel — Doorbell) has 'payment coming soon.' Make sure the Aquara card is in Invoiced stage and has a payment follow-up date set.

deals.next_action: Review iGarden proposal and respond to Dimple — May 20 campaign window is tight
deals.notes: [Apr 25]: Follow-up from Dimple at Make Wonder INC (official partner of iGarden). Original outreach was Apr 22. Offering paid collaboration (asking Liz to share her rates) OR free premium unit — iGarden K60 pool cleaner or Swim Jet System ($2,000+ value). Deliverables: 1 dedicated video (IG Reel, TikTok, or YouTube) + 6-month usage rights for brand's official channels. Campaign window: April 20 - May 20. Budget TBD — awaiting Liz's rate card. Liz has not replied yet. Possible long-term partnership potential mentioned.

deals.next_action: Follow up on Aleve content approval if no response by Apr 28
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Mariah's Friday weekly status email confirms Aleve is 'under content approval' — 3x Instagram Reels @Aleve_US, $12,000. Waiting on brand to approve.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Confirmed in Approval stage via Mariah's weekly status — 3x IG Reels @Aleve_US under brand review

deals.next_action: Finish and submit Smart Solar Lights reel + story to brand (caption uploaded, video still in progress)
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Hard content deadline Mon/Tue April 27-28 per brand request (via socialmediacollabs.com). Liz uploaded caption to Drive folder on Apr 24 — social media manager confirmed receipt. Reel still being edited. Deliverables: 1x 60-90s IG Reel reviewing Linkind SP6 Smart Solar Pathway Lights + 1x Story set (3 frames, include link) + TikTok cross-post + comment-for-link. $2,000. Mariah's status: 'in progress need content.'
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Caption uploaded to Drive. Brand (via socialmediacollabs) confirmed receipt and set Mon/Tue Apr 27-28 hard deadline for full content submission.

deals.next_action: Verify Bark TikTok was posted 4/24 — if yes, move to Delivered and send invoice
deals.notes: [Apr 25]: Bark TikTok + Whitelisting ($750) had a due date of 4/24/26 per Mariah's Friday status. No delivery confirmation found in email inbox. Flagging as potentially overdue — needs immediate verification.
deals.activity_note: Apr 25: Bark due date 4/24 has passed — no delivery email found. Needs urgent verification.

deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Alisa Gofman (Analyst, Paid Social at Hawke Media) confirmed ads are live for Liz's 'Expert Transition' UGC creative. Alisa mentioned she increased ad spend. Liz had uploaded the creative to the spreadsheet earlier that morning.
